description: Reset an MLS group by replacing its group ID and clearing ephemeral state

main.description: Reset an MLS group for a conversation. Only admins may reset a group. This increments the reset count, swaps the group ID, resets the epoch to 0, and clears welcome messages and pending device additions.

newGroupId.description: New MLS group identifier to replace the current one

cipherSuite.description: MLS cipher suite identifier for the new group

groupInfo.description: Optional MLS GroupInfo for the new group

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason for the reset

newGroupId.description: The new group identifier that was applied

resetGeneration.description: Cumulative reset count for this conversation

errors.name: NotAdmin
errors.description: Caller is not an admin of the conversation

errors.name: GroupIdAlreadyExists
errors.description: The new group ID is already in use by another conversation
